title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: A YouTuber discusses the withdrawal of Claude Fable 5 after a three-day public launch, citing US government export-control directives and alleged jailbreak concerns. The video covers the regulatory event, model performance benchmarks relative to Claude Opus, and implications for developers building on these models.
writeup: Cole Medin breaks down the abrupt removal of Claude Fable 5 by Anthropic, tied to an apparent US government export-control directive and a claimed jailbreak that triggered the action. The video covers what the directive means for developers who relied on the model and walks through the jailbreak said to have prompted the response. It also includes benchmarks comparing Fable 5 to Opus 4.8, recorded before the model became unavailable.
